headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Pinnacle West Capital, Raises Price Target to $108
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Pinnacle West Capital (NYSE:PNW) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $102 to $108.
